title: Formulas, functional groups and the naming of organic compounds
summary: 9701 AS — homologous series, functional groups, and IUPAC naming.
learningObjectives: State general formulas of homologous series.

simpleExplanation.title: Organic naming toolkit
simpleExplanation.summary: Organic chemistry organises compounds into series sharing a functional group. IUPAC names encode chain length and substituents.
steps: Number to give substituents lowest locants.

sections.content: **Organic naming** (13.1) is foundation for **Topic 14+**. Practise **name ↔ structure** both directions.
